message.content:
Explore the codebase at /Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe and find all files related to:
1. Profile page and profile editing
2. Edit profile details modal/dialog
3. Edit address modal/dialog
4. KYC/verification modal/dialog

Look in src/widgets, src/features, src/pages-layer, app directories. Find the actual component files and their current styling. Return the file paths and key content of each relevant file.

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive view of the codebase. Let me compile the final report:

## Complete Codebase Exploration Report

I've thoroughly explored the codebase and found all the files related to profile pages, modals, and KYC components. Here's the comprehensive breakdown:

### 1. PROFILE PAGE AND MAIN COMPONENTS

**Main Profile Page Component:**
- **File**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/pages-layer/profile/ui/profile-page.tsx`
- **Index**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/pages-layer/profile/index.ts`
- **Route Handler**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(app)/(protected)/profile/page.tsx`
- **Current Styling**: Comprehensive custom styling with:
  - Settings cards: `rounded-2xl border border-[#D6D3D1] bg-[#F5F3EF] p-6`
  - Card headers: `font-serif text-xl font-light leading-[120%] text-[#44403C]`
  - Field boxes: `rounded-xl border border-[#E7E5E4] bg-white/60 px-4 py-3`
  - Small buttons: `rounded-lg border border-[#A8A29E] bg-[#F5F3EF]`
  - Includes 5 main sections: Profile Details, Account Verification (KYC), Registered Addresses, Currency Settings, and Notifications

**Layout File:**
- **File**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(app)/(protected)/layout.tsx`
- **Status**: Full-width profile page is rendered without sidebar
- **Dynamic Components**: Uses dynamic imports for EditProfileModal, AddressModal, and DeleteAddressModal

---

### 2. EDIT PROFILE DETAILS MODAL

**Component File:**
- **File**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/edit-profile-modal/ui/edit-profile-modal.tsx`
- **Index**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/edit-profile-modal/index.ts`
- **Model Types**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/edit-profile-modal/model/types.ts`

**Key Features:**
- Uses Zod schema validation for fullName, email, phone, and UAE ID
- Form fields:
  - Full Name (editable)
  - Email (disabled)
  - Phone number (disabled)
  - UAE ID (disabled)
- Dialog styling: `w-[526px] gap-5 p-[22px_20px]`
- Submit button: `w-[150px] rounded-[15px] px-[30px] py-2.5 font-bold`
- Uses react-hook-form for form management
- Only updates fullName field (email, phone, uaeId are disabled)

**Form Data Interface:**
```typescript
export interface EditProfileFormData {
  fullName: string;
  email?: string;
  phone?: string;
  uaeId?: string;
}
```

---

### 3. EDIT ADDRESS MODAL/DIALOG

**Component File:**
- **File**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/address-modal/ui/address-modal.tsx`
- **Index**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/address-modal/index.ts`
- **Model Types**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/address-modal/model/types.ts`

**Key Features:**
- Comprehensive address form with validation via Zod
- Form fields (13 total):
  - Country/Region (dropdown)
  - Full Name
  - Phone number
  - "Use my Location" button (not implemented)
  - Address Line 1 (Flat, House no., Building, etc.)
  - Address Line 2 (Area, Street, Sector, Village)
  - Landmark (optional)
  - ZIP code
  - Town/City
  - State
- Dialog styling: `w-[526px] gap-5 p-[22px_20px]`
- Form labels: `font-serif text-sm leading-[1.571em]`
- Input fields: `px-[15px] py-[9px] font-serif text-xs`
- Submit button: `w-[150px] rounded-[15px]`
- Used for both adding new address and editing existing address

**Form Data Interface:**
```typescript
export interface AddressFormData {
  countryId: string;
  fullName: string;
  phone: string;
  addressLine1: string;
  addressLine2: string;
  landmark?: string;
  zip: string;
  city: string;
  state: string;
}
```

---

### 4. DELETE ADDRESS CONFIRMATION MODAL

**Component File:**
- **File**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/delete-address-modal/ui/delete-address-modal.tsx`
- **Index**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/delete-address-modal/index.ts`

**Key Features:**
- Simple confirmation dialog
- Dialog styling: `w-[459px] gap-5 rounded-input p-5`
- Title styling: `text-start font-bold font-serif text-base leading-[1.199em]`
- Two buttons: "No" (outline) and "Confirm" (primary)
- Button styling: `h-[33px] flex-1 rounded-input px-[50px] py-2`

---

### 5. KYC/VERIFICATION MODAL AND SECTIONS

**KYC Status Section (Profile Page):**
- **File**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/kyc-status-section/ui/kyc-status-section.tsx`
- **Index**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/kyc-status-section/index.ts`
- **Styling**: Same as profile settings cards
  - Card: `rounded-2xl border border-[#D6D3D1] bg-[#F5F3EF] p-6`
  - Title: `font-serif text-xl font-light text-[#44403C]`
  - Button: `rounded-lg border border-[#A8A29E] bg-[#F5F3EF] px-3 py-1.5`
- **Status States**:
  - No KYC Status (shows "Start Account Verification" button)
  - KYC Processing (shows info message)
  - KYC Verified (green success message)
  - KYC Requires Input (orange warning with "Retry Verification" button)
  - KYC Cancelled (orange warning with "Start Account Verification" button)
- **Status Messages**:
  - No status / Cancelled: Orange box `border-[#FED7AA] bg-[#FFEDD5]` with `text-[#9A3412]`
  - Processing: White box `border-[#E7E5E4] bg-white/60` with `text-[#44403C]`
  - Verified: Green box `border-[#A7F3D0] bg-[#ECFDF5]` with `text-[#047857]`

**Stripe Identity Verification Modal (Main KYC Modal):**
- **Modal Component**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/stripe-identity-verification/ui/stripe-identity-modal.tsx`
- **Verification Component**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/stripe-identity-verification/ui/stripe-identity-verification.tsx`
- **Index**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/stripe-identity-verification/index.ts`
- **Dialog Styling**: `max-w-[600px] p-5`
- **Content**:
  - Title: "Verify Your Identity"
  - Description paragraph
  - Info box: `bg-[#E5F2F0] p-5` with checklist of required items
  - Start Verification button
- **Functionality**: Integrates with Stripe Identity for KYC verification

**Alternative KYC Verification Required Modal:**
- **File**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/kyc-verification-required-modal/ui/kyc-verification-required-modal.tsx`
- **Dialog Styling**: `w-[517px] gap-0 rounded-[10px] p-0`
- **Purpose**: Prompts users to complete KYC before proceeding with buyback
- **CTA**: Links to profile KYC page

**Other KYC Related Components:**
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/kyc-section/ui/kyc-section.tsx` - Old design KYC section
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/admin-kyc-section/ui/admin-kyc-section.tsx` - Admin KYC section

---

### 6. AUTHENTICATION LAYOUT

**File**: `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/authenticated-layout/ui/authenticated-layout.tsx`

**Current Behavior**:
- Profile route (`/profile`) uses new Header and Footer
- Other routes use AuthenticatedHeader (old design)
- Profile page is rendered as full-width without sidebar
- Conditional rendering: `isNewDesign = NEW_DESIGN_ROUTES.includes(pathname)`

---

### 7. SHARED UI COMPONENTS USED

**Dialog Components:**
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/shared/ui/dialog/dialog.tsx`
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/shared/ui/dialog/dialog-close-button.tsx`
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/shared/ui/shadcn/dialog.tsx`

**Other Shared Components Used**:
- Button
- Input
- Label
- Select (with SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectValue)
- Separator
- Switch

---

### 8. CURRENT COLOR SCHEME AND STYLING CONSTANTS

**Primary Colors Used:**
- Background: `#F5F3EF`
- Border: `#D6D3D1` and `#E7E5E4`
- Text primary: `#44403C`
- Text secondary: `#78716C`
- Text muted: `#A8A29E`
- White/light: `white/60`, `#FFEDD5`
- Error: `#9A3412` (orange/brown)
- Success: `#047857` (green)
- Info: `#E5F2F0` (light teal)

**Typography:**
- Serif font for titles and labels: `font-serif`
- New-sans font for body text: `font-new-sans`
- Common sizes: `text-xs`, `text-sm`, `text-xl`, `text-base`
- Leading: `leading-[120%]`, `leading-[150%]`, `leading-[1.199em]`

**Common Border Radius:**
- Cards: `rounded-2xl`, `rounded-xl`
- Buttons: `rounded-lg`, `rounded-[15px]`, `rounded-input`

---

### 9. KEY API/QUERY HOOKS USED

- `useProfile()` - Fetch profile data
- `useAddress()` - Fetch address data
- `useUpdateProfile()` - Update profile
- `useUpsertAddress()` - Add or update address
- `useDeleteAddress()` - Delete address
- `useUserSettings()` - Fetch user notification settings
- `useUpdateUserSettings()` - Update notification settings
- `useKycStatus()` - Fetch KYC status
- `useInitiateKyc()` - Start KYC verification
- `useCountries()` - Get countries list

All components follow a consistent pattern using React Query for data management and react-hook-form for form handling.
